articles.title: Binance Wallet adds Plume’s yield vault offering access to Invesco and Bitwise funds
articles.summary: Binance Wallet has added Plume's yield vault, giving users access to tokenized funds managed by Invesco and Bitwise.

articles.title: ‘Best course of action:’ DeFi dashboard Zapper to shut down after 7 years

articles.summary: The investment firm said its fourth fund will back AI, robotics, and crypto startups as it broadens beyond digital assets.

articles.title: Bitcoin Stalls as Ethereum Flashes Worst Weekly Signal in Years: Analysis

articles.title: Officials set to revise MiCA to cover non-EU stablecoin issuers: Report
articles.summary: EU officials reportedly plan to consider changes to the Markets in Crypto-Assets framework, dubbed by some as “MiCA 2.0,” in response to a US stablecoin law and rules on tokenized payments and deposits.

articles.title: Cash App owner Block to pay $45 million after states say it made false security promises
articles.summary: Block Inc. has agreed to pay $45 million to settle allegations brought by regulators in nearly every U.S. state.

articles.title: Bitcoin peels back to $62K as Fed-wary futures traders cut risk: Is the BTC rally over?
articles.summary: Bitcoin hovered around the $62,000 mark following a spike in oil prices, escalating hot war in Iran and traders’ move to cut risk ahead of a Federal Reserve policy statement.

articles.title: CFTC Chair Says Clarity Act Is ‘So Close’ As August Deadline Nears
articles.summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

CFTC Chair Says Clarity Act Is ‘So Close’ As August Deadline Nears
CFTC Chairman Michael Selig urged Congress to pass the Clarity Act before the August recess, saying the crypto market-structure bill is "so close" despite ongoing disputes over ethics and stablecoin provisions.
This post CFTC Chair Says Clarity Act Is ‘So Close’ As August Deadline Nears first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

articles.title: Adam Back’s Bitcoin treasury company seeks new terms with Cantor for SPAC merger
articles.summary: The Bitcoin Standard Treasury Company and Cantor Equity Partners I announced that they were looking into amending the terms of a 2025 merger deal that “better reflected market conditions.”

articles.title: Lucky Trader Turns $85 Into $2 Million on Robinhood Chain Meme Coin

articles.title: Bull Bitcoin Files Landmark Legal Challenge to Annul France’s DAC8 Crypto Data Surveillance Rules
articles.summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Bull Bitcoin Files Landmark Legal Challenge to Annul France’s DAC8 Crypto Data Surveillance Rules
The filing marks the first major legal challenge to DAC8 in the EU. Bull Bitcoin warns that forced consolidation of user data undermines both privacy and the regulation’s own tax-collection goals by driving users toward unregulated alternatives.
This post Bull Bitcoin Files Landmark Legal Challenge to Annul France’s DAC8 Crypto Data Surveillance Rules first appeared on Bitcoin M...
